subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath triumphed on the Day of God, and heard the Call, and answered his Ancient Lord, that he may rejoice within himself [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @call to action
